description_long: This is a large, military-style cargo truck with a robust, utilitarian design. The truck features a single cab with two doors and a flat, open cargo bed with metal railings on all sides, suitable for transporting goods or equipment. The exterior is painted in a matte olive drab color, typical of military or utility vehicles, and the cargo bed is constructed from wooden planks supported by a metal frame. The truck has three axles and six large, rugged tires designed for heavy loads and off-road capability. The front grille is simple, with rectangular headlights and a license plate, while the side mirrors extend outward for enhanced visibility. The cab interior appears to have basic seating and controls, emphasizing function over comfort.
description: A large, olive drab military-style cargo truck with a single cab and an open flatbed with metal railings and wooden flooring, supported by six rugged tires.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open flatbed cargo area with wooden planks and metal railings, as well as the back of the cab and rear lights.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the length of the flatbed, the three axles with six large tires, and the utilitarian cab design.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cab's windshield, grille, headlights, and license plate, with a clear look into the cab's interior.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, showing the flatbed, three axles, and the cab's door and side mirror.
